lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਜਮਕੰਕਰਾ ਨੋ ਆਖਿ ਛਡਿਆ ਏਸੁ ਤਪੇ ਨੋ ਤਿਥੈ ਖੜਿ ਪਾਇਹੁ ਜਿਥੈ ਮਹਾ ਮਹਾਂ ਹਤਿਆਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dharam raae jamakankaraa no aakh chhaddiaa es tape no tithai kharr paaeihu jithai mahaa mahaan hatiaariaa |
lines.english: The Righteous Judge of Dharma said to the Messenger of Death, "Take this penitent and put him with the worst of the worst murderers."

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਏਸੁ ਤਪੇ ਦੈ ਮੁਹਿ ਕੋਈ ਲਗਹੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਏਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਹੈ ਫਿਟਕਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: fir es tape dai muhi koee lagahu naahee ehu satigur hai fittakaariaa |
lines.english: No one is to look at the face of this penitent again. He has been cursed by the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਦਰਿ ਵਰਤਿਆ ਸੁ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ ॥ ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਜੁ ਦਯਿ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har kai dar varatiaa su naanak aakh sunaaeaa | so boojhai ju day savaariaa |1|
lines.english: Nanak speaks and reveals what has taken place in the Court of the Lord. He alone understands, who is blessed and adorned by the Lord. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਭਗਤ ਨਿਤ ਗਾਂਵਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਖਦਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har keeratan bhagat nit gaanvade har naam sukhadaaee |
lines.english: The Lord's devotees continually sing the Kirtan of His Praises; the Name of the Lord is the Giver of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਾਂ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagataan har aaraadhiaa har kee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: The devotees of the Lord worship and adore the Lord, and the glorious greatness of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਾਂ ਨੋ ਨਿਤ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਬਖਸੀਅਨੁ ਨਿਤ ਚੜੈ ਸਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagataan no nit naavai dee vaddiaaee bakhaseean nit charrai savaaee |
lines.english: The Lord ever bestows upon His devotees the glorious greatness of His Name, which increases day by day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਾਂ ਨੋ ਥਿਰੁ ਘਰੀ ਬਹਾਲਿਅਨੁ ਅਪਣੀ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagataan no thir gharee bahaalian apanee paij rakhaaee |
lines.english: The Lord inspires His devotees to sit, steady and stable, in the home of their inner being. He preserves their honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕਾਂ ਪਾਸਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗਸੀ ਬਹੁ ਦੇਇ ਸਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: nindakaan paasahu har lekhaa mangasee bahu dee sajaaee |
lines.english: The Lord summons the slanderers to answer for their accounts, and He punishes them severely.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਅਪਣੈ ਜੀਇ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਤੇਹੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jehaa nindak apanai jee kamaavade teho fal paaee |
lines.english: As the slanderers think of acting, so are the fruits they obtain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕਮਾਣਾ ਸਰਪਰ ਉਘੜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਕੋਈ ਬਹਿ ਧਰਤੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਕਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: andar kamaanaa sarapar ugharrai bhaavai koee beh dharatee vich kamaaee |
lines.english: Actions done in secrecy are sure to come to light, even if one does it underground.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਵਿਗਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak dekh vigasiaa har kee vaddiaaee |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak blossoms forth in joy, beholding the glorious greatness of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: paurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Pauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਮੂੜ ਗੁਮਾਨੀਆ ਵਿਸੁ ਖਾਧੀ ਮਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: gumaan kareh moorr gumaaneea vis khaadhee mareeai |
lines.english: The proud fool acts in pride, and eating his own poison, he dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾਂ ਕਾ ਰਾਖਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਕਿਆ ਪਾਪੀ ਕਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaan kaa raakhaa har aap hai kiaa paapee kareeai |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is the Protector of His devotees; what can the sinner do to them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਲਗੇ ਨੀ ਦਿਹ ਥੋੜੜੇ ਜਿਉ ਪਕਾ ਖੇਤੁ ਲੁਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aae lage nee dih thorrarre jiau pakaa khet luneeai |
lines.english: His few days have come to an end, and he is cut down like the crop at harvest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਵਡਾ ਹੈ ਸਭਨਾ ਦਾ ਧਣੀਐ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kaa khasam vaddaa hai sabhanaa daa dhaneeai |30|
lines.english: Glorious and great is the Lord and Master of servant Nanak; He is the Master of all. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਤੇਵੇਹੋ ਭਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jehe karam kamaavade teveho bhaneeai |
lines.english: According to one's actions, so is one spoken of.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੂਲਹੁ ਭੁਲਿਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh moolahu bhuliaa vich lab lobh ahankaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs forget the Primal Lord, the Source of all; they are caught in greed and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਧਿ ਮਤਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਸਭ ਹਿਰਿ ਲਈ ਬੋਲਨਿ ਸਭੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sudh mat karatai sabh hir lee bolan sabh vikaar |
lines.english: The Creator has taken away all their understanding and purity; all their speech is evil and corrupt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਗੜਾ ਕਰਦਿਆ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਦਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਕਰਹਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jhagarraa karadiaa anadin gudarai sabad na kareh veechaar |
lines.english: They pass their nights and days in conflict and struggle; they do not contemplate the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਮੁਖਾ ਨਾਲੋ ਤੁਟੀ ਭਲੀ ਜਿਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak manamukhaa naalo tuttee bhalee jin maaeaa moh piaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, it is good to break away from the self-willed manmukhs, who have love and attachment to Maya. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਤੈ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਅਹਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਬਹੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: ditai kitai na santokheeeh antar tisanaa bahu agiaan andhayaar |
lines.english: No matter what they are given, they are not satisfied; within their hearts there is great desire, ignorance and darkness.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਹੈ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa andar doojaa bhaau hai tinaa guramukh preet na hoe |
lines.english: Those whose hearts are filled with the love of duality, do not love the Gurmukhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਕੂੜੁ ਉਚਰੈ ਕੂੜਿ ਲਗਿਆ ਕੂੜੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kamaavai koorr ucharai koorr lagiaa koorr hoe |
lines.english: They practice falsehood and they speak falsehood; attached to falsehood, they become false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਭਵਾਈਐ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ohu aavai jaae bhavaaeeai supanai sukh na koe |
lines.english: They come and go, and wander in reincarnation; even in their dreams, they find no peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਹੈ ਦੁਖਿ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu sabh dukh hai dukh binasai dukh roe |
lines.english: The love of Maya is total pain; in pain they perish, and in pain they cry out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਧਾਤੁ ਲਿਵੈ ਜੋੜੁ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਜੇ ਲੋਚੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak dhaat livai jorr na aavee je lochai sabh koe |
lines.english: O Nanak, there can be no union between the love of worldliness and the love of the Lord, no matter how much everyone may desire it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੋਤੈ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਪਇਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin kau potai pun peaa tinaa gurasabadee sukh hoe |2|
lines.english: Those who have the treasure of virtuous deeds find peace through the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵੀਚਾਰਹਿ ਸੰਤ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨਾਂ ਚਾਰਿ ਵੇਦ ਕਹੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak veechaareh sant mun janaan chaar ved kahande |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Saints and the silent sages think, and the four Vedas proclaim,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: paurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Pauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਗਟ ਪਾਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਪਦੇ ਸਭਿ ਲੋਕ ਸੁਣੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: paragatt paahaarai jaapade sabh lok sunande |
lines.english: He is revealed in His cosmic workshop; all people hear of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਮੁਖੈ ਤੇ ਬੋਲਦੇ ਸੇ ਵਚਨ ਹੋਵੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat mukhai te bolade se vachan hovande |
lines.english: that whatever the Lord's devotees speak comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਮੁਗਧ ਨਰ ਸੰਤ ਨਾਲਿ ਖਹੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: sukh na paaein mugadh nar sant naal khahande |
lines.english: The foolish people, who fight with the Saints, find no peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਵੇਚਾਰੇ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਜਾਂ ਭਾਗ ਧੁਰਿ ਮੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: oe vechaare kiaa kareh jaan bhaag dhur mande |
lines.english: What can those wretched ones do? Their evil destiny was pre-ordained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਲੋਚਨਿ ਓਨਾ ਗੁਣਾ ਨੋ ਓਇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਸੜੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: oe lochan onaa gunaa no oe ahankaar sarrande |
lines.english: The Saints seek to bless them with virtue, but they are burning with egotism.
